name: Deezer
description: Music streaming service offering on-demand audio and podcast content with personalized discovery features.

years.notes: Original Deezer logo (2007–2019). Equalizer icon with five colorful columns (red, yellow, pink, green, sky blue) in flat solid colors alongside uppercase wordmark. Used until the 2019 redesign.
2019 redesign (2019–2023). Equalizer icon refined with gradient-filled bars (orange to blue spectrum) and lowercase wordmark. Viewbox 1000×191.
2023 rebrand by Koto, launched November 7 2023. Heart-shaped waveform icon in Deezer Purple (#A238FF) with bold uppercase wordmark in near-black. Replaces the equalizer bars identity used since 2007.
